title: Post-Audit: hx-action-bar — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-action-bar

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-action-bar` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] 7 MEDIUM/deferred items documented in AUDIT.md for follow-up (bottom sticky position, center alignment, Drupal Twig, scroll-padding docs, default label guidance)
- [ ] The `label` property is a breaking change from the previous `aria-label` pass-through pattern

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817611136-9dz83gbp3`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/hx-action-bar.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/hx-action-bar.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/hx-action-bar.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/hx-action-bar.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/AUDIT.md`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: 7 MEDIUM/deferred items documented in AUDIT.md for follow-up (bottom sticky position, center alignment, Drupal Twig, scroll-padding docs, default label guidance)
The `label` property is a breaking change from the previous `aria-label` pass-through pattern

title: Post-Audit: hx-breadcrumb — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-breadcrumb

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-breadcrumb` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `current` attribute is additive — existing behavior (last item = current page) still works when no item has `current` set. This is backward compatible.
- [ ] The ellipsis expand sets `maxItems = 0` permanently on click, meaning re-collapse requires a page reload or explicit re-set.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817611248-6zvrfppiu`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb-item.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb-item.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/hx-breadcrumb.test.ts`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The `current` attribute is additive — existing behavior (last item = current page) still works when no item has `current` set. This is backward compatible.
The ellipsis expand sets `maxItems = 0` permanently on click, meaning re-collapse requires a page reload or explicit re-set.

title: Post-Audit: hx-button — follow-up items
description:

title: Post-Audit: hx-card — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-card

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-card` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] P2 issues documented in AUDIT.md remain unfixed (by design — per audit scope "Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest")
- [ ] The `hx-label` property should be recommended in docs for all interactive cards in healthcare contexts where URL-based labels are non-descriptive
- [ ] Consider adding a dev-mode console.warn when `hx-href` and `actions` slot are both populated (currently prevented only in story examples)

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817628532-lybzc4c0f`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/hx-card.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/hx-card.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/hx-card.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/hx-card.stories.ts`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: P2 issues documented in AUDIT.md remain unfixed (by design — per audit scope "Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest")
The `hx-label` property should be recommended in docs for all interactive cards in healthcare contexts where URL-based labels are non-descriptive
Consider adding a dev-mode console.warn when `hx-href` and `actions` slot are both populated (currently prevented only in story examples)

title: Post-Audit: hx-carousel — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-carousel

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-carousel` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `scroll-container` CSS part was renamed to `viewport` — any external CSS targeting `::part(scroll-container)` needs updating
- [ ] Pagination dots now use `aria-selected` instead of `aria-current` (better semantic match for tab pattern)
- [ ] The `label` property reflects to host, so consumers can use CSS `[label="..."]` selectors if needed

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817634363-6ub04xmql`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/hx-carousel.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/hx-carousel-item.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/hx-carousel.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/hx-carousel.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/hx-carousel.test.ts`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The `scroll-container` CSS part was renamed to `viewport` — any external CSS targeting `::part(scroll-container)` needs updating
Pagination dots now use `aria-selected` instead of `aria-current` (better semantic match for tab pattern)
The `label` property reflects to host, so consumers can use CSS `[label="..."]` selectors if needed

title: Post-Audit: hx-dialog — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-dialog

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-dialog` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] 13 P2/P3 items remain open and documented in AUDIT.md for future work (alertdialog variant, aria-describedby, returnValue, form-inside-dialog story, etc.)
- [ ] The wc-mcp accessibility score (F) reflects missing CEM annotations for ARIA roles/attributes, not actual runtime a11y issues — the component correctly uses native `<dialog>` role and aria-modal/aria-labelledby at runtime

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817716044-41n12756z`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/hx-dialog.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/hx-dialog.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/hx-dialog.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/hx-dialog.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-dialog/AUDIT.md`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: 13 P2/P3 items remain open and documented in AUDIT.md for future work (alertdialog variant, aria-describedby, returnValue, form-inside-dialog story, etc.)

The wc-mcp accessibility score (F) reflects missing CEM annotations for ARIA roles/attributes, not actual runtime a11y issues — the component correctly uses native `<dialog>` role and aria-modal/aria-labelledby at runtime

title: Post-Audit: hx-divider — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-divider

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-divider` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The wc-mcp accessibility score (0/F) is a tooling limitation, not a real issue — the component correctly implements `role="separator"`, `aria-orientation`, and `role="presentation"` at runtime
- [ ] Private member CEM leakage is now fixed with `@internal` — run `npm run cem` to regenerate and verify

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817720942-rmrumvkjv`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/hx-divider.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/hx-divider.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/hx-divider.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/AUDIT.md`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The wc-mcp accessibility score (0/F) is a tooling limitation, not a real issue — the component correctly implements `role="separator"`, `aria-orientation`, and `role="presentation"` at runtime
Private member CEM leakage is now fixed with `@internal` — run `npm run cem` to regenerate and verify

description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-field

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-field` that were not fixed inline.

### Items

items: 6 P1 issues from v1 audit remain deferred (require design decisions — see AUDIT.md)
14 P2 issues remain open (1 fixed in v2: help text color token)

title: Post-Audit: hx-focus-ring — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-focus-ring

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-focus-ring` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The wc-mcp accessibility score remains F (5/100) — this is **expected** for a purely visual utility component with no ARIA role, no form association, no keyboard events of its own
- [ ] The `--hx-border-width-focus` and `--hx-spacing-focus-offset` semantic tokens are referenced but may not yet exist in the token package — they degrade gracefully to the `2px` primitive fallback
- [ ] The dark mode `--hx-color-primary-300` token reference may need to be defined in the token layer for full cascade support

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817757140-113yrfzhv`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/hx-focus-ring.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/hx-focus-ring.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/hx-focus-ring.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/hx-focus-ring.stories.ts`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The wc-mcp accessibility score remains F (5/100) — this is **expected** for a purely visual utility component with no ARIA role, no form association, no keyboard events of its own
The `--hx-border-width-focus` and `--hx-spacing-focus-offset` semantic tokens are referenced but may not yet exist in the token package — they degrade gracefully to the `2px` primitive fallback
The dark mode `--hx-color-primary-300` token reference may need to be defined in the token layer for full cascade support

title: Post-Audit: hx-icon — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-icon

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-icon` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] P2 items are documented in AUDIT.md but intentionally not fixed (design decisions, cross-cutting concerns)
- [ ] The `svgCache` is module-scoped and never expires — appropriate for icon SVGs that don't change at runtime. If dynamic SVG sources are needed in the future, a TTL or `WeakRef`-based cache could be added.
- [ ] wc-mcp accessibility score (10/100 F) is misleading — hx-icon is non-interactive and correctly lacks focus management, disabled state, keyboard events, and form association. The label property scores correctly.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817790371-tsiaaq4ay`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/hx-icon.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/hx-icon.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/hx-icon.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/AUDIT.md`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: P2 items are documented in AUDIT.md but intentionally not fixed (design decisions, cross-cutting concerns)

The `svgCache` is module-scoped and never expires — appropriate for icon SVGs that don't change at runtime. If dynamic SVG sources are needed in the future, a TTL or `WeakRef`-based cache could be added.

wc-mcp accessibility score (10/100 F) is misleading — hx-icon is non-interactive and correctly lacks focus management, disabled state, keyboard events, and form association. The label property scores correctly.

title: Post-Audit: hx-image — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-image

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-image` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `rounded` property type changed from `boolean | string | undefined` to `string | undefined`. Usage: `rounded` (boolean attr = theme token), `rounded="1rem"` (custom), `rounded="50%"` (circle). The string `"false"` is treated as no radius.
- [ ] The `decorative` prop is a breaking change from the previous behavior where `alt=""` triggered `role="presentation"`. Now `alt=""` alone does NOT add presentation role — `decorative` must be set explicitly.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817803756-8amrem221`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/hx-image.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/hx-image.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/hx-image.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/hx-image.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/AUDIT.md`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The `rounded` property type changed from `boolean | string | undefined` to `string | undefined`. Usage: `rounded` (boolean attr = theme token), `rounded="1rem"` (custom), `rounded="50%"` (circle). The string `"false"` is treated as no radius.

The `decorative` prop is a breaking change from the previous behavior where `alt=""` triggered `role="presentation"`. Now `alt=""` alone does NOT add presentation role — `decorative` must be set explicitly.

title: Post-Audit: hx-popover — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-popover

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-popover` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `_handleOutsideClick` uses capture phase to ensure it fires before any stopPropagation calls in child elements
- [ ] `queueMicrotask` ensures the listener isn't registered until after the opening click completes propagation

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817870733-b0q0scnpa`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/hx-popover.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/hx-popover.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/hx-popover.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/AUDIT.md`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The `_handleOutsideClick` uses capture phase to ensure it fires before any stopPropagation calls in child elements
`queueMicrotask` ensures the listener isn't registered until after the opening click completes propagation

title: Post-Audit: hx-prose — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-prose Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-prose` that were not fixed inline. ### Items - [ ] The `p:first-child` lead removal is a visual change — CMS content will no longer auto-style first paragraphs. Use `

` explicitly. - [ ] `caption-side: top` changes table caption visual position. Verify with existing Drupal content. - [ ] `th` text can now wrap on narrow screens, which improves mobile readability but changes table layout. ### Context - Audit feature: `feature-1772817894966-wu1ip1xbs` - Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-prose/hx-prose.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-prose/hx-prose.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/styles/prose/_media.css`, `packages/hx-library/src/styles/prose/prose.css`, `packages/hx-library/src/styles/prose/prose.scoped.css` - Audit cost: $0.00
items:
The `p:first-child` lead removal is a visual change — CMS content will no longer auto-style first paragraphs. Use `

` explicitly.
`caption-side: top` changes table caption visual position. Verify with existing Drupal content.
`th` text can now wrap on narrow screens, which improves mobile readability but changes table layout.

title: Post-Audit: hx-select — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-select

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-select` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The component scored 88 (B) in wc-mcp. The remaining 12 points come from `propertyDescriptions` dimension scoring — now that all members have descriptions, a re-score with fresh CEM cache should show improvement.
- [ ] The accessibility implementation score (50/F) in wc-mcp is a documentation detection issue, not an actual a11y gap. The component has proper combobox ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, and passes all axe-core audits.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772817933588-r69rvyw4k`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-select/hx-select.ts`, `packages/hx-library/custom-elements.json`
- Audit cost: $0.00
items: The component scored 88 (B) in wc-mcp. The remaining 12 points come from `propertyDescriptions` dimension scoring — now that all members have descriptions, a re-score with fresh CEM cache should show improvement.

The accessibility implementation score (50/F) in wc-mcp is a documentation detection issue, not an actual a11y gap. The component has proper combobox ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, and passes all axe-core audits.

title: Post-Audit: hx-text — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-text

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-text` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `WcText` type alias follows the established `Wc*` pattern used across all components
- [ ] The `inverse` color a11y test uses `background: #1e293b` wrapper — matches the Storybook story pattern

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772818137227-6riajkryb`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/hx-text.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/hx-text.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/hx-text.stories.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/hx-text.test.ts`
- Audit cost: $4.44
items: The `WcText` type alias follows the established `Wc*` pattern used across all components
The `inverse` color a11y test uses `background: #1e293b` wrapper — matches the Storybook story pattern

title: Post-Audit: hx-text-input — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-text-input

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-text-input` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The wc-mcp score ceiling for this component is 93/100 due to CEM analyzer including private members without descriptions. To reach 100, the CEM analyzer would need to support `@internal` exclusion or the wc-mcp scorer would need to ignore private members.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772818143902-0ipda5cyv`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/hx-text-input.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/hx-text-input.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/hx-text-input.stories.ts`
- Audit cost: $3.04
items: The wc-mcp score ceiling for this component is 93/100 due to CEM analyzer including private members without descriptions. To reach 100, the CEM analyzer would need to support `@internal` exclusion or the wc-mcp scorer would need to ignore private members.

title: Post-Audit: hx-textarea — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-textarea

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-textarea` that were not fixed inline.

items: Component was already well-built. Changes are documentation-only (JSDoc improvements for CEM accuracy).
Tests and stories were already comprehensive — no additions needed.

title: Post-Audit: hx-tile — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-tile

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-tile` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `get_design_tokens` MCP tool errored (tokensPath not configured) — not a component issue
- [ ] Pre-existing warnings in hx-meter.ts (non-null assertions) and docs (deprecated execCommand) are unrelated

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772818161288-yu706dc09`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tile/hx-tile.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tile/hx-tile.styles.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tile/hx-tile.test.ts`
- Audit cost: $1.32
items: The `get_design_tokens` MCP tool errored (tokensPath not configured) — not a component issue
Pre-existing warnings in hx-meter.ts (non-null assertions) and docs (deprecated execCommand) are unrelated

title: Post-Audit: hx-toggle-button — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-toggle-button

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-toggle-button` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `formAssociated` and `_internals` CEM fields are missing descriptions (noted in health score issues) but these are internal/static fields that don't need public documentation

### Context

- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toggle-button/hx-toggle-button.ts`

items: The `formAssociated` and `_internals` CEM fields are missing descriptions (noted in health score issues) but these are internal/static fields that don't need public documentation

title: Post-Audit: hx-tree-view — follow-up items
description:
## Post-Audit Follow-Up: hx-tree-view

Issues identified during Deep Audit v2 of `hx-tree-view` that were not fixed inline.

### Items
- [ ] The `part="label"` → `part="row"` rename on hx-tree-item's row element is a breaking change for anyone using `::part(label)` to style the row container.

### Context
- Audit feature: `feature-1772818203938-lrjong74k`
- Files modified during audit: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/hx-tree-item.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/hx-tree-view.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/hx-tree-view.test.ts`, `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tree-view/hx-tree-view.stories.ts`
- Audit cost: $2.28
items: The `part="label"` → `part="row"` rename on hx-tree-item's row element is a breaking change for anyone using `::part(label)` to style the row container.
